title: Sequelize Associations Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on model relationships and associations in Sequelize.

questions.question: Which association type would you use for a One-to-Many relationship where the foreign key is defined on the target model?
Which association type requires a join table to define a Many-to-Many relationship?
In a One-to-One relationship between User and Profile (where Profile has a user_id), which of these should be on the Profile model?
What property do you use in a findAll query to eagerly load associated models?
How many main types of associations does Sequelize provide?
